name: Pasta Fagioli Ala Cardosa
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Fresh Roman or Cranberry beans (white with a red fleck running through) or 1 lb Dried beans soaked overnight
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook all of the beans in two quarts of water until tender; drain and reserve the cooking liquid.
2. Put half of the cooked beans through a food mill, putting the pulp back into the reserved cooking liquid and discarding the skins.
3. Meanwhile, sauté onion until transparent in olive oil; add chopped parsley and garlic slices and stir into the bean pulp and cooking liquid. Add more water if necessary and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Add the raw macaroni and cook until tender. Then add the remaining cooked beans and heat through. The consistency should be a hearty soup.
5. Serve piping hot, drizzling olive oil on top of each bowl. A sprinkling of fresh grated Locatelli cheese is optional but adds delicious flavor.
6. This wonderful dinner pairs well with a crispy green salad, crusty Italian bread, and a bottle of your favorite wine.
